    -You gain the ability to done an Lock Slash onto enemy(By R)
    -The more you travel with your ability, the more damage you deal
    -Sigil cd reduction buffed a bit.
    -You can return to your crystal while charging
    Experimental weapon preview
  • Raigeki
    #AoE #Crowd-Control #Defense #Burst
    By Spookmaster
    3000
    - M1 swings an electric blade which hits multiple targets.
    - Holding M2 drains mana to charge a huge lightning bolt (Raigeki), which strikes your position when released.
    - Charging grants resistance and damages nearby enemies with Static Electricity.
    Experimental weapon preview
    +100% faster firing speed
    +100% damage bonus while disguised
    +150% faster melee attack speed
  • Direct Current
    4000
    -General stat buffs.
    -Unlocks {yellow}Kinetic Energy{default}: attack and kill enemies with M1 or get hit while charging Raigeki to build it up.
    -Kinetic Energy buffs Static Electricity, and supercharges your electric blades after Raigeki strikes.

    8000
    -General stat buffs.

    Rush: Gain speed and attackspeed
    Beast: Pick up building.
  • Normal Fists
    7000

    - Summon an Ion that bounces
    Melee:
    M1:
    - Fire an Energy Wave.
    - Costs Crystals.
    - On hit gain crystals

  • The Blitzkrieg
    #DPS #AOE
    By jDeivid
    1000
    - A glass cannon kit
    - Primary: Rocket launcher, shoots multiple rockets.
    - Reload is manual.
    - Reload time scales on how many rockets you have left in your clip.
    - On targets hit you gain ION Charges
    - On Pap 0 the patterns do nothing!
    - Secondary: M1 Casts ION. Uses Charges
    Melee: Base state is weak. When primary is reloading its buffed:
    - Increased dmg
    - Increased Width
    - AOE Melee
    - Knockback on non raids
  • Hurricane-Blitz
    Free
    Patterns: While holding your primary you can press M2 to change from Alpha and Beta patterns:
    Alpha: All Rockets Shoot directly forward
    Beta: All rockets shoot TOWARDS the point that your cursor is looking at
    - Increased Damage
    - More Rockets Fired
    - Large Clipsize
    Experimental weapon preview

    +60% faster firing speed

  • Mechanized Terror
    #DPS #AoE #Burst
    By Pandora,e̶ ,Owlbine,Unknown(Fish), Artvin
    1000
    Become the Ziberian greatest invention... A monster.
    - Gain 2 weapons, Shotgun and Rampager rifle
    - Press M2 To easy switch between them
    - Charge energy on hit, used for later paps
    - Weapons has overheat and will lose damage the more you use them
    - The more one weapon overheats the stronger other weapons becomes
    - Also gain special buffs if other weapon is overheated
    - Gain 40％ more energy from hitting enemies up close.
  • Purging Crusher
    Free
    Become the Ziberian greatest invention... A monster.
    - Gain 2 weapons, Shotgun and Rampager rifle
    - Press M2 To easy switch between them
    - Charge energy on hit, used for later paps
    - Weapons has overheat and will lose damage the more you use them
    - The more one weapon overheats the stronger other weapons becomes
    - Also gain special buffs if other weapon is overheated
    - Gain 40％ more energy from hitting enemies up close.
    Experimental weapon preview
    250% damage penalty
    +100% damage bonus
    Fires a wide, fixed shot pattern
    +10000 max health on wearer
    +100% faster firing speed
    100% faster reload time
  • Purging Crusher
    1000
    -Increased damage
    -Increased Health
    Experimental weapon preview
  • Purging Crusher
    2500
    -Increased damage
    -Increased Health
    -While your shotgun is out, your M2 will give you a minigun.
    -Minigun Abilities:
    Heavy Resistance while out
    Attacking the same target massively boosts damage, upto 2x
    After some time, or by pressing R, minigun unequips
    Takes 30％ more damage from raids
    Deals 20％ less damage to raids.
    Experimental weapon preview
  • Purging Crusher
    4000
    -Increased damage
    -Increased Health
    -Minigun now lasts longer, and Holsters faster.
    Experimental weapon preview
  • Purging Crusher
    6500
    -Increased damage
    -Increased Health
    -While your Rampager rifle is out, M2 will give you a Quad Rocket Launcher.
    -Quad launcher Abilities:
    Shoots 2 rockets at once
    When depleted, explodes, dealing damage
    Force fully equips fists and makes you deal ram damage while running
    You take more damage while ramming
    Experimental weapon preview

    10000

    -Increased Health

  • Aresenal's Tripmine Layer
    #AoE
    By Artvin, Spookmaster Bones
    1500
    - Tripmines that when enemy trips on them, explodes
    - Hafe armtime, take 1 second to ramp up to full damage once placed.
    - Scales with builder upgrades.
    - Press M2 Twice while looking up to pick up all spikes
    - Press m2 on a spike to pick that one up.
    Experimental weapon preview
    +0% bullets per shot
    +150% faster firing speed
    100% damage penalty
  • Aresenal's Tripmine Layer
    1500
    -Increased damage
    -Increased attackspeed
    Experimental weapon preview
  • Chemical Spewer
    #AoE #Crowd-Control #DoT
    By Batfoxkid
    3000
    A flamethrower that scales with building upgrades.
    - Inflicts Nervous Impairment elemental damage alongside damage dealt.
    - Applies afterburn that deals Magic damage.

    Critical damage is affected by range
    No airblast

  • Chemical Spewer
    5000
    -Base damage is increased
    -Consumes less ammo.

    #DPS
    By Batfoxkid
    30000
    Hidden
    Attacks deal extra damage and mark the main target.
    Has a chance to explode and stun when hitting marked targets.
    Ability grants sentry buildings and a limited-ammo rocket launcher.

    +0% damage to self
    +100% damage bonus

    • Misc Items
    Trophies
  • Magia Wings [???]
    Oh how the Stars shine upon those who rule Ruina...
  • Silvester Wings [???]
    Howd you get this? this is admin only.
  • ZR Content Creator
    You created enough content to be worthy!
    You start with an extra 50 credits.
  • ZR Contest 2024 Artist
    You joined the art contest. Start with extra 50 extra credits.
  • ZR Contest 2024 Top 10
    You won a contest. Start with extra 100 extra credits.
  • ZR Contest 2024 Top 20
    You won a contest. Start with extra 75 extra credits.
  • ZR Contest 2024 Top 30
    You won a contest. Start with extra 50 extra credits.
  • ZR Contest Nominator 2023
    You won a contest way back then. Does nothing now.
  • Cured Silvester
    Silvester must be glad to have lunatics like you!
    Activating The final pap of the default expidonsan blade gives you a halo!
  • Blitzkrieg's Army
    With Blitzkrieg being defeated, his army is at your disposal...
  • Head Equipped Blue Goggles
    Seems like you beat Waldch and Silvester... are you ready?
  • Calmaticus' Heart Piece
    You beat the heart of the infection, however, the other is left...
  • Medieval Crown
    You beat alaxios...?
  • Alaxios's Godly assistance
    You beat alaxios... Or did he just let you live?
    Your banners will be much louder!
  • Expidonsan Battery Device
    Sensal's scythe becomes red!
    Activating this will make it blue again.
  • There Can Be Only One
    Buy greg some ammo, he'll need it.
  • Bob's Curing Hand
    The Sea infection has been beaten, but so have you.
  • Iberian and Expidonsan Training
    The Angelica Shotgonnus, its halo and arm halo become more energetic.
    it also unlocks scythe recolour options!
  • Scythe Color Option 1
    After doing Iberian and Expidonsan Training...
    Turns your sensal scythe White!
  • Scythe Color Option 2
    After doing Iberian and Expidonsan Training...
    Turns your sensal scythe Yellow!
  • Scythe Color Option 3
    After doing Iberian and Expidonsan Training...
    Turns your sensal scythe Purple!
  • A copy of Truthful Evidence
    This is a Copy of the evidence received from Sensal.
    See some incomprehensible words, but think there's a hidden meaning
    This seems to be why Victoria invaded Ziberia.
    You became the primary target of Victorians due to this…
  • Expidonsan Research Card
    You beat Vincent, it's unknown how exactly you did it however...
    Trophy!
    When using, turns your music... weird.
  • Twirl's Hairpins
    Strange that she gave you these.
  • Kahmlsteins Last Will
    Keep the void away.. at all costs, he begs of you...
  • Kahml's Contained Chaos
    You helped Kahml get rid of his chaos affliction.
    He doesnt like to say thanks directly though.
    Buffs up the secondary ability duration by 2 seconds.
  • Dropped Secret Letter
    Dropped on the floor after beating Blitz’s army.
    Written on it is someone pleading for help from this machine?
    And it’s signed by someone named Karlas?
  • Xeno Virus Sample
    A sample of the Xeno virus after we beat them in Xeno Survival.
    Maybe this will help us find the source of the infection.
  • Son of Osiris’s Gift
    Osiris gives us this for helping him and the rest of Alaxios’s army train.
    It’s a book on how to become a Brawler…
  • Tiny Flower
    Another tiny flower from Flowering Darkness, a garden is being maintained by their army.
    As a garden regrows, as such does their army.
  • Broken Expidonsan Tech
    Broken off one of the elite rogue expidonsans.
    It appears to be stronger than Sensal's tech, at least by the look of it.
  • Iberia's Last Hope
    You saved Iberia from Whiteflower rule.
    But can you save what’s left of Iberia from the Seaborn.
  • Iberian Badge of Honor
    Irene gives you this for all you have done for Iberia,
    dating back to before you were employed by Bob the Second.
  • Avangard's Processing Core-B
    After destroying the Radiomast at the Victorian outpost, along with the soldiers there, you find this on the ground. drop by one of the Avanguards we killed.
  • Collector’s Backpack
    The backpack worn by the Aperture Collector.
    The tech within looks extremely advanced.
  • Ruianian Necklace
    A golden necklace with a gem at the end of it.
    Ruliana gives it to us as a gift from Twirl.
  • Major Voided’s Hat
    Somehow still intact after the explosion. A bit big but still usable.
  • Ancient Demon Horn
    Broken off an Ancient Demon we killed.
    We have no idea what to use it for…
  • Warped Crystal
    Made from the combination of Chaos and Void.
    Let's hope none of us crystallizes so we don’t get encased in one of these.
  • Chaos Machina Waldch Chip
    You managed to kill off the machine, the impostor..
  • Corrupted Barney's Chainsaw
    I wonder what happened to Barney here...
  • Matrix's Curse
    You beat Agent Smith! However, I think that somehow, that was his goal...
  • Omega's Medallion
    You got spared by Omega! He gave you one of his medallions as a treat.
    You can wear it with pride, congratulations.
  • A Block of Cheese
    WIP.
  • Xeno Virus Vial
    It's over, you defeated it, go find Vivithorn, this was a facade, kill him, he can't restart the entirety of xeno anymore.
  • Mr. X's Files
    Legacy Item, has no use, you just beat Calmaticus before the new update on abandoned lab.
    But now you can obtain it in bossrush... Wow!!! You're so epic!!!
  • Overlords Final Wish
    Restore and protect Bob the first, that is his final wish...
  • Bob's true fear
    It is the loss of family and friends, of which has happened...
  • Whiteflower's Elite Grenade
    Throwable grenades last 20％ longer.
  • Major Steam's Rocket
    You beat rogue2's default ending!
  • Waldch's Expidonsan Sword
    Wildingen is finally free, The hitman is taken out, sadly theres more, but he was the main one...
    Equip to disable its cosmetic effects.
  • Opened Void Portal
    You released the void, you fool..!
  • Gem from the Curtain
    A small crystal with a faint glow. A single word is etched on the back: Purgatory.
    Trophy!
  • Reila's Scorn Keycard
    She trusts you now, good work, take down shadowing darkness .
    Trophy!
  • Jkei's Broken Entry Chip
    Entry to the deeper castle.
    Trophy!
  • Shadow's Letter
    Seems like a love letter to Guln.
    Trophy!
    Makes your dead teuton a mini shadow statue when using.
  • Foreign Expidonsan Chip
    You proved that you are actually usefull to these expidonsans, and have setup a base for the curtain attack.
    Trophy!.
  • Almagest Data Card
    You stopped the almagest from escaping with their spaceship and held your base!
    Trophy!.
    • Level Perks
    Melee Perks
  • Panic Attack
    Free
    Level: 7
    - You attack 15％ slower but the lower your health is, the faster you attack, up to 25％ faster
    - Doesn't work with last man alive.
    Fire rate increases as health decreases

    - Take 10％ less fall damage
    Immune to the effects of afterburn
  • Living Armor
    Free
    Level: 23
    - Armor now regens over 15 seconds if not hurt
    - Armor icon changes
    - Max Armor is halved
    - Armor protects only 50％ instead of 75％
    - Cant get armor from buildings
    - Armor corrosion disables this perk
  • Sticky Support Grenades
    Free
    Level: 28
    - Your extra equipment grenades will now instantly stick on where they land instead of rolling.
    +100% damage bonus
  • Armor Visualiser
    Free
    Level: 5
    You can now see the armor of fellow allies via a bar above their head.
    +100% damage bonus
  • Building Health Forcer
    Free
    Level: 5
    This makes you always see building HP, No matter what weapon you have.
    +100% damage bonus
  • Rapturing Zombies
    Free
    Level: 100
    Rarely do enemies feel the tendency to ascend to heaven.
    +100% damage bonus
    • Barracks Civilization
  • Iberia and Expidonsan's Help
    Free
    Iberians Offer their assistance!
    Thorns might join up if you help his cause...
  • Iberia's Last Hope
    Free
    Replaces Monk and Hussar with Thorns
    Maybe Iberia's Training might help...
    Activate if you only want thorsn with normal barracks.
  • Blitzkrieg's Army
    Free
    With Blitzkrieg being defeated, his army is at your disposal...
  • Guln's Companions
    Free
    Retain chaos with guln's army!
